plugins.name: claude-council
plugins.description: Consult multiple AI coding agents (Gemini, OpenAI, Grok) for diverse perspectives on coding problems

plugins.name: claude-image-generation
plugins.description: Generate and edit images using Google Gemini and OpenAI GPT Image APIs

plugins.name: claude-guard
plugins.description: Safety guardian that prevents destructive commands, blocks credential exposure, and redirects dangerous operations to safer alternatives

plugins.name: claude-tmux
plugins.description: Connect to remote hosts via SSH in tmux panes with saved host management

plugins.name: claude-taskmaster
plugins.description: Completion guard that prevents premature stopping with TASKMASTER_DONE signal and 6-point completion checklist
